headline: Grow Your Blog Community
description: With Wix Blog, you’re not only sharing your voice with the world, you can also grow an active online community. That’s why the Wix blog comes with a built-in members area - so that readers can easily sign easily up to become members of your blog. What can members do. Members can follow each other, write and reply to comments and receive blog notifications. Each member gets their own personal profile page that they can customize.
